mainEntity.name: Who pays medical bills right after a machine malfunction injury in Sandy?
mainEntity.text: Who pays medical bills right after a machine malfunction injury in Sandy?

acceptedAnswer.text: Your employer's workers' comp insurance covers all reasonable medical expenses related to the machine injury, with no upfront cost to you.[4][2]

suggestedAnswer.text: Utah mandates comp coverage for machine injuries, paying ER, surgery, rehab directly. Providers bill the insurer. Delays happen if claim disputed—Labor Commission mediates. Choose any doctor initially, but insurer may direct later. In West Jordan or Taylorsville, track bills to avoid gaps.[2][5]

name: Who Covers Medical Costs in Machine Accident Claims
description: Your employer's workers' comp insurance covers all reasonable medical expenses related to the machine injury, with no upfront cost to you.[4][2]
